channel.title: signal_source | ECE Engineering Journal
channel.description: Projects, failures, field notes, and learning logs from an ECE student becoming a hardware engineer.

item.title: UART Transceiver in Verilog
item.description: Implemented a full-duplex UART module with configurable baud rate.

item.title: Why I Spent a Week on a Problem I Could Have Googled
item.description: On the value of struggling with Verilog timing constraints before reading the solution.

item.title: The simulation passed. The board disagreed.
item.description: A post-mortem on why the ALU worked in ModelSim and produced garbage on silicon.
